constructs.name: escalation
constructs.description: Rising probability of coercion, conflict expansion, military action, or hostile bargaining.

columns.name: cameo_conflict_count_1d
columns.definition: One-day count of conflict or coercive event codes.

columns.name: cameo_conflict_count_7d
columns.definition: Seven-day rolling count of conflict or coercive event codes.

columns.name: goldstein_conflict_sum_7d
columns.definition: Seven-day sum of negative Goldstein-weighted event values.

columns.name: battle_event_count_7d
columns.definition: Seven-day count of violent battle or strike events.

columns.name: fatality_count_7d
columns.definition: Reported fatalities aggregated over the last seven days.

columns.name: cross_border_strike_indicator_7d
columns.definition: Indicator for reported cross-border strike activity in the past week.

columns.name: shock_event_count_3d
columns.definition: Count of high-salience events over the last three days.

constructs.name: de_escalation
constructs.description: Rising probability of talks, cooling rhetoric, ceasefire movement, or lower operational tempo.

columns.name: cameo_cooperation_count_1d
columns.definition: One-day count of cooperative event codes.

columns.name: cameo_cooperation_count_7d
columns.definition: Seven-day rolling count of cooperative event codes.

columns.name: goldstein_cooperation_sum_7d
columns.definition: Seven-day sum of positive Goldstein-weighted event values.

columns.name: official_meeting_count_7d
columns.definition: Count of verified official meetings, calls, or summits over seven days.

columns.name: ceasefire_reference_count_7d
columns.definition: Count of ceasefire or truce references over seven days.

columns.name: diplomatic_progress_score_7d
columns.definition: Weighted score for negotiation-positive official language.

columns.name: violence_decline_ratio_7d
columns.definition: Decline in violent events versus trailing baseline.

failure_modes: one-sided statements misread as mutual progress

constructs.name: negotiation
constructs.description: Actual bargaining activity, not vague rhetoric.

columns.name: official_talks_count_7d
columns.definition: Count of official negotiation events over seven days.

columns.name: backchannel_reference_count_7d
columns.definition: Count of credible backchannel reports over seven days.

columns.name: mediator_activity_count_7d
columns.definition: Count of mediator or intermediary activity reports over seven days.

columns.name: agreement_draft_indicator_7d
columns.definition: Indicator for draft agreement or framework circulation.

columns.name: joint_statement_indicator_7d
columns.definition: Indicator for joint or coordinated official statement.

columns.name: negotiation_cadence_gap_days
columns.definition: Days since last confirmed negotiation event.

failure_modes: false equivalence between contact and formal negotiation

constructs.name: military_pressure
constructs.description: Observable evidence of force positioning or coercive signaling.

columns.name: air_sortie_signal_3d
columns.definition: Proxy count of unusual military aviation references over three days.

columns.name: force_movement_count_7d
columns.definition: Count of reported troop, naval, or air asset movements.

columns.name: weapons_deployment_indicator_7d
columns.definition: Indicator for notable deployment reports over seven days.

columns.name: missile_reference_count_7d
columns.definition: Count of missile, air defense, or long-range strike mentions.

columns.name: mobilization_reference_count_7d
columns.definition: Count of mobilization or readiness references.

columns.name: pentagon_alert_score_3d
columns.definition: Weighted score for official readiness or force posture language.

constructs.name: regime_fragility
constructs.description: Underlying vulnerability of the political system to instability or elite fracture.

columns.name: vdem_regime_score
columns.definition: Institutional regime quality measure.

columns.name: elite_fragmentation_score
columns.definition: Proxy score for elite division, turnover, or faction conflict.

columns.name: protest_event_count_30d
columns.definition: Count of protest events in the last 30 days.

columns.name: repression_event_count_30d
columns.definition: Count of repression or crackdown events in the last 30 days.

columns.name: inflation_stress_score
columns.definition: Inflation or price instability proxy.

columns.name: gdp_growth_proxy
columns.definition: Growth deterioration proxy.

columns.name: instability_history_count_365d
columns.definition: Count of prior-year instability events.

constructs.name: deadline_pressure
constructs.description: Time pressure from contract expiry or relevant political calendars.

columns.name: days_to_deadline
columns.definition: Days remaining until contract expiry.

columns.name: hours_to_deadline
columns.definition: Hours remaining until contract expiry.

columns.name: days_since_last_major_event
columns.definition: Recency gap since the last major catalyst.

columns.name: scheduled_meeting_within_7d
columns.definition: Indicator for an upcoming relevant official meeting.

columns.name: decision_window_indicator
columns.definition: Indicator for a known political, legal, or military timing window.

columns.name: calendar_congestion_score
columns.definition: Count of relevant deadlines or catalysts clustered in the next seven days.

constructs.name: market_stress
constructs.description: Information from price dynamics, volatility, flow, and liquidity strain.

columns.name: market_prob
columns.definition: Latest market-implied probability.

columns.name: market_momentum_1d
columns.definition: One-day market-implied probability change.

columns.name: market_momentum_7d
columns.definition: Seven-day market-implied probability change.

columns.name: market_volatility_7d
columns.definition: Volatility of recent price changes.

columns.name: order_flow_imbalance_1d
columns.definition: Yes-minus-no order flow imbalance.

columns.name: liquidity_depth_score
columns.definition: Ease-of-execution liquidity proxy.

columns.name: spread_proxy
columns.definition: Estimated spread or slippage proxy.
